comments.nucleus.server: Use 'localhost' for local Nucleus, or the hostname/IP of your enterprise Nucleus server.
comments.mqtt.broker: Hostname or IP of the edge device running the IoT Operations MQTT broker, reachable from this Windows machine. Use the NodePort or LoadBalancer address exposed by the cluster.
comments.update_interval_ms: How often (ms) the connector flushes attribute writes to the USD stage.
